LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'S MOTION TO DEEM REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS ADMITTED. NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED. UNDER CCP 2033.280(C), THE COURT SHALL DEEM REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS (RFAS) ADMITTED, UNLESS IT FINDS THE RESPONDING PARTY, BEFORE HEARING ON THE MOTION, SERVED A PROPOSED RESPONSE TO THE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION THAT IS IN SUBSTANTIAL COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 2033.220. THE RECORD DEMONSTRATES DEFENDANT OYUN ENEBISH FAILED TO RESPOND. THE RECORD DOES NOT DEMONSTRATE HER FAILURE WAS REASONABLE OR JUSTIFIED. THE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS SET OUT IN PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS, SET NO. 1 ARE DEEMED ADMITTED. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-22-2025 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-22-2025 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to Defendant Oyun Enebish.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: D. Carter;
Matter not reported.

Roger Jackson, Esq. appeared on behalf of Plaintiff Bank of America N.A.
No appearance by Defendant Oyun Enebish.

Plaintiff Align Technology, Inc., a Delaware Corporation submits exhibits for the Court's review.

The matter is submitted.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Bank of America N.A. and against Defendant Oyun Enebish.

Plaintiff Bank of America N.A. is awarded judgment against Defendant Oyun Enebish as follows:

Damages/Principal: $7,730.62
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0
Costs: $426.30
Total Judgment: $8,156.92

Proposed Judgment was submitted and signed by the Court.
Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits.

Motion To Deem Requests For Admissions Admitted
Off Calendar Sep-05-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'S MOTION TO DEEM REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS ADMITTED

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: GRANTED.

Under CCP 2033.280(c), the court shall deem requests for admissions (RFAs) admitted, unless it finds the responding party, before hearing on the motion, served a proposed response to the requests for admission that is in substantial compliance with CCP 2033.220. The record demonstrates Defendant Oyun Enebish failed to respond. The record does not demonstrate her failure was reasonable or justified. The requests for admissions set out in Plaintiff's Request for Admissions, Set No. 1 are deemed admitted. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-30-2025 Set For Trial On Sep-22-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
